channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

1. Hyundai stops sales of some 2026 models and plans a recall after child's death  CBS News

  4. Hyundai Issued a Stop-Sale for Top Trim Palisades After a Fatal Accident  Car and Driver
  5. Hyundai stops sales of certain SUVs after 2-year-old girl dies, reports say  FOX19 | Cincinnati

item.title: Dell workforce drops 10% in fiscal 2026, filing shows - Reuters
item.description:
1. Dell workforce drops 10% in fiscal 2026, filing shows  Reuters

  3. Dell confirms in filing that its workforce continues to shrink (DELL:NYSE)  Seeking Alpha
  4. Dell Has Reduced Its Workforce By 27 Percent From FY 2023 to FY 2026  crn.com
  5. Dell continues to quietly shrink its workforce  Business Insider

item.title: David Zaslav to Receive More Than $550 Million in Compensation Related to Warner Bros.-Paramount Merger - Variety
item.description:

  4. Warner Bros. CEO to Make $667 Million on Paramount Sale  Bloomberg.com
  5. Warner Bros CEO David Zaslav in line for $700m payout from Paramount deal  The Guardian

item.title: Stock Market News, March 17, 2026: Dow Jumps, Brent Crude Pulls Back From $105 Oil Gains Amid Mideast Attacks - WSJ
item.description:

item.title: Oil Prices Slide As Iran Opts For 'Porous' Strait Of Hormuz - Investor's Business Daily
